negative_invariants.description: auth/transport.py, its singleton tests, and policy/audit.py are byte-identical to upstream/main across the whole mission (ADR 2026-05-18-2 deferral to Robert; FR-006 keep).
negative_invariants.verification_command: bash -c 'test -z "$(git diff $(git merge-base upstream/main HEAD) HEAD -- src/specify_cli/auth/transport.py tests/architectural/test_auth_transport_singleton.py src/specify_cli/policy/audit.py)"'
negative_invariants.evidence: Re-anchored to durable refs at pre-merge squad (lane-c branch was deleted post-merge, making the original command vacuously green — alphonso [MEDIUM]); re-executed on pr/unshim-wave1: exit 0, byte-identical to merge-base.
